title: Mumbai Heat Wave
lead: Mumbai is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.74. The city has reached a critical heat level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Mumbai has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 74%, and the wind speed is 10.1 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable. 
 The city's infrastructure is under strain, with the heat wave expected to continue in the coming days.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
